s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the mass air flow meter connector (*1).
Disconnect the purge VSV connector (*2).
Disconnect the 2 purge VSV vacuum hoses (*3).
Disconnect the purge line hose from the clamp (*4).
Disconnect the No. 2 ventilation hose from the air cleaner hose.
Lock the No. 1 air cleaner hose clamp, and then disconnect the No. 1 air cleaner hose from the throttle body.
Remove the 2 bolts and air cleaner cap.
Remove the air cleaner filter element from the air cleaner case.
Remove the 2 nuts and cover.
Remove the No. 1 fuel pipe clamp.

atten3.ptxt: Check for foreign matter on the pipe and around the connector before disconnecting the quick connector. Clean the connector if necessary.

s2.ptxt: If the connector and pipe are stuck, pinch the connector, and push and pull the pipe to disconnect them.

item.ptxt: Do not use any tools in this procedure.
Check for foreign matter on the sealing surface of the disconnected pipe. Clean it if necessary.

s2.ptxt: Separate the fuel tube from the fuel hose clamp.
Disconnect the No. 2 ventilation hose from the ventilation valve.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FUEL DELIVERY PIPE WITH INJECTOR

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 wire harness clamps.
Disconnect the 4 fuel injector connectors.
Remove the 2 bolts, then remove the fuel delivery pipe together with the 4 fuel injectors.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop the fuel injectors when removing the fuel delivery pipe.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 delivery pipe spacers from the cylinder head.
Remove the 4 insulators from the cylinder head.
Pull out the 4 injectors from the delivery pipe.
Remove the 4 O-rings from the injectors.
